steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage does two things: names two specific buildings as examples of a design trend, then explains the principles behind that trend (post-WWII technology emphasis and traditional preservation). The correct answer must describe both parts accurately.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — The text introduces the salient characteristics of two buildings and then details the historical events that occasioned the buildings' designs.: The second part is wrong — the passage explains design principles, not historical origins of the trend. ✗
  • Choice B — The text names projects that are noteworthy for their inclusion of certain materials and then explains past important uses of the materials.: The passage does not discuss past material uses; it describes a philosophy of combining technology with tradition. ✗
  • Choice C — The text distinguishes between two aesthetic approaches to architecture and then submits that one approach has had more of a long-term impact than the other has had.: The passage presents two aesthetics as coexisting, not one winning out. ✗
  • Choice D — The text cites examples of a design trend and then briefly establishes the principles underlying the trend.: Matches both parts — the two buildings are the examples, and the post-WWII technology/tradition balance is the underlying principle. ✓
D is correct.
